title: Executive Assistant cum Receptionist
description:
About Us

Allinton Engineering & Trading Pte Ltd is a trusted distributor of industrial and engineering products, serving the marine, oil & gas, construction, and manufacturing industries. With a strong reputation built over decades, we are dedicated to delivering quality solutions, excellent customer service, and long-term partnerships.


Position Overview

The Executive Assistant cum Receptionist provides comprehensive administrative, personal assistance, and front-desk support to the Chief Executive Officer (CEO). This role requires a high level of discretion, organisation, and adaptability, supporting both business and selected personal matters while ensuring smooth daily office operations at the reception area.


Key Responsibilities

  • Manage and coordinate the directors’ calendar, meetings, appointments, and schedules
  • Prepare meeting agendas, attend meetings when required, and record accurate minutes
  • Provide administrative coordination for approved personal errands
  • Assist in scheduling and coordinating medical appointments and related arrangements
  • Liaise with external parties such as clinics, service providers, or caregivers as required
  • Ensure sensitive personal information is handled confidentially and professionally
  • Handle confidential correspondence, documentation, and administrative matters with discretion
  • Assist with ad-hoc administrative and operational tasks as assigned by the director
  • Be stationed at the reception area and serve as the first point of contact for visitors and callers
  • Manage incoming calls, visitors, mail, and deliveries in a professional manner
  • Maintain a tidy, organised, and welcoming reception area
  • Support general office coordination and administrative tasks


Key Requirements

  • Diploma or equivalent qualification in Business Administration or a related field
  • Minimum 2 years of experience in an Executive Assistant, Personal Assistant, or Front Office role
  • Strong organisational and multitasking skills
  • High level of professionalism, discretion, and confidentiality
  • Good interpersonal and communication skills
  • Proficient in Microsoft Office and standard office systems
  • Nursing or Caretaking experience (optional)

postedCompany.description:
Established in 1982, Allinton Engineering & Trading Pte Ltd plays a dynamic role as the one stop solution provider in the supply of quality hardware tools and equipment to local and overseas customers. 


We cater to a wide spectrum of markets such as Marine & Offshore, Oil & Gas, Shipyards, Construction, Petrochemical and Manufacturing. As a rapidly expanding business, we continually seek to diverse our services into more sectors. 


To provide customers with the best quality products, we carry an extensive and comprehensive range of equipment from renowned brands such as AET, Fastcut & Kanazawa, etc.


Allinton prides herself on the company culture of progressive learning and development. We strive to hire the brightest and most curious minds. We believe that with the right mindset and attitude, opportunities are present for all to chart your own path by owning your development, your career, and your future.
postedCompany.name: ALLINTON ENGINEERING & TRADING PTE. LTD.
